{"code":"prs = github.list_pull_requests(state="open")
total = len(prs)
from collections import Counter
counts = Counter(p["repo"] for p in prs)
top_repo, top_count = counts.most_common(1)[0]
{"total_open": total, "by_repo": dict(counts), "top_repo": top_repo, "top_count": top_count}
"}
